labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 334112 ($2,645,563,443) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 334112 ($4,553,072,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

occupations.title: Electrical, Electronic, and Electromechanical Assemblers, Except Coil Winders, Tapers, and Finishers

Inspectors, Testers, Sorters, Samplers, and Weighers
